reviews.comment:
Excelente trato y atencion, por parte de todos los empleados. Todos implementan correctamente los protocolos sanitarios por covid.
Sanitarios impecables. La estacion dispone de dispensador de agua caliente.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service and attention from all employees. Everyone correctly implements COVID-19 health protocols.
Impeccable restrooms. The station has a hot water dispenser.
